# Maxim Autos

> Maxim Autos is a used car dealership in Skokie, Illinois selling inspected vehicles priced roughly $5,000 to $15,000. Every car includes an independent mechanical inspection report and a CARFAX history report. Every qualifying used car is backed by Illinois' 15 day / 500 mile statutory powertrain protection. Extended coverage is available as an option at signing, ask Jerry for pricing when you visit. As an Illinois CVR dealer, Maxim Autos issues metal license plates on the spot, so buyers drive home the same day with no DMV trip.

Key facts: located at 9101 Terminal Ave, Skokie, IL 60077. Phone (847) 510-8947, call or text. Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday 3pm to 7pm; Saturday 10am to 3pm. Inventory is managed in DealerCenter, the dealership system of record, and this site updates from that live feed several times a day. The site is available in English and in Spanish at https://www.maximautos.com/es/.

Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.

## What Makes Maxim Autos Different

- Maxim Autos is a licensed Illinois CVR (Computer Vehicle Registration) dealer. This means buyers receive real metal Illinois license plates at the dealership on the day of purchase. No temporary paper tags, no DMV trip required.
- CVR electronic registration is authorized by the Illinois Secretary of State. Not every used car dealer holds this authorization; Maxim Autos does.
- Every vehicle sold includes a full independent mechanical inspection report prepared by a third-party mechanic. The report covers engine, drivetrain, brakes, suspension, tires, electrical systems, and interior/exterior.
- Every vehicle includes a free CARFAX vehicle history report covering accident history, service records, and number of prior owners.
- Every qualifying used car is backed by Illinois' 15 day / 500 mile statutory powertrain protection. Extended coverage is available as an option at signing, ask Jerry for pricing when you visit.
- Inventory is priced $5,000 to $15,000. All prices are listed upfront. There are no dealer documentation fees or hidden charges. The listed price plus standard Illinois tax, title, and license is the total cost.
- No Dealer Fees Ever: Maxim Autos charges no dealer fees, no doc fee and no processing fee; the listed price plus tax, title and license is the full price.
- Financing is available for all credit levels including first-time buyers and buyers rebuilding credit.
- The owner, Jerry Franco, personally selects and sources every vehicle at auction. Buyers deal directly with the owner, not a commissioned salesperson.
- Maxim Autos holds a 5-star Google rating based on verified customer reviews.
- The dealership is located at 9101 Terminal Ave, Skokie, IL 60077, serving Chicago's North Shore including Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, Wilmette, and Glenview.

## Inventory

- [Current inventory](https://www.maximautos.com/inventory): every vehicle for sale right now with photos, pricing, and mileage
- [Vehicle feed](https://www.maximautos.com/feeds/vehicles.xml): XML feed of current inventory, readable by machines (Google Merchant Center format)

## Buying

- [Financing](https://www.maximautos.com/financing): financing options for all credit levels, including first time buyers
- [Credit application](https://www.maximautos.com/apply): secure online credit application
- [FAQ](https://www.maximautos.com/faq): common questions about buying, warranties, plates, and trades
- [Shipping](https://www.maximautos.com/ship): nationwide vehicle shipping for buyers outside Illinois
- [Sell or trade](https://www.maximautos.com/sell-trade): get an offer for your current vehicle

## About

- [About Maxim Autos](https://www.maximautos.com/about): the dealership, the inspection process, and the team
- [Testimonials](https://www.maximautos.com/testimonials): customer reviews
- [Contact](https://www.maximautos.com/contact): directions, hours, and contact form

- [Site in Spanish](https://www.maximautos.com/es/): Spanish version of the inventory, financing, and contact pages
